---
title: "Quick Demo"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Quick Demo}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>", cache = TRUE)
quiet <- function(expr) invisible(capture.output(suppressMessages(expr)))
```

## Connect

```{r connect, cache = FALSE}
library(dsFlowerClient)
library(DSI)
library(DSOpal)

builder <- DSI::newDSLoginBuilder()
builder$append(server = "hospital_a", url = "https://localhost:8443",
               user = "administrator", password = "admin123",
               driver = "OpalDriver",
               options = "list(ssl_verifyhost=0, ssl_verifypeer=0)")
builder$append(server = "hospital_b", url = "https://localhost:8444",
               user = "administrator", password = "admin123",
               driver = "OpalDriver",
               options = "list(ssl_verifyhost=0, ssl_verifypeer=0)")
builder$append(server = "hospital_c", url = "https://localhost:8445",
               user = "administrator", password = "admin123",
               driver = "OpalDriver",
               options = "list(ssl_verifyhost=0, ssl_verifypeer=0)")

conns <- DSI::datashield.login(logins = builder$build(), assign = FALSE)
```

## Initialize

```{r init}
ds.flower.nodes.init(conns, resource = "dsflower_test.flower_node")

caps <- DSI::datashield.aggregate(
  conns, expr = quote(flowerGetCapabilitiesDS("flower"))
)
for (srv in names(caps)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s: %d rows x %d cols\n",
    srv, caps[[srv]]$data_n_rows, caps[[srv]]$data_n_cols))
}
```

## Prepare and start SuperLink

```{r superlink}
ds.flower.nodes.prepare(
  conns, target_column = "target",
  feature_columns = c("f1", "f2", "f3", "f4", "f5")
)

quiet(ds.flower.superlink.start())
Sys.sleep(2)

status <- ds.flower.superlink.status()
status[c("pid", "fleet_address", "federation_id")]
```

```{r proof}
system2("ps", c("-p", status$pid, "-o", "pid,command"), stdout = TRUE)
```

## Train

```{r train}
quiet(ds.flower.nodes.ensure(conns))
Sys.sleep(10)

result <- ds.flower.run.start(
  ds.flower.recipe(
    task     = ds.flower.task.classification(),
    model    = ds.flower.model.sklearn_logreg(C = 1.0),
    strategy = ds.flower.strategy.fedavg(
      min_fit_clients = 3L, min_available_clients = 3L),
    num_rounds      = 5L,
    target_column   = "target",
    feature_columns = c("f1", "f2", "f3", "f4", "f5")
  ),
  verbose = TRUE
)
```

## Results

```{r results}
result
```

## Cleanup

```{r cleanup, cache = FALSE}
ds.flower.nodes.cleanup(conns)
ds.flower.superlink.stop()
DSI::datashield.logout(conns)
```
